channel.title: Group Tours on Passport Stories
channel.description: Recent content in Group Tours on Passport Stories

item.title: Chasing the Migration: Kenya’s Ultimate Safari Trail
item.description:
🌟 Why Choose This Kenya Safari

  • Carefully crafted itinerary covering icons like Maasai Mara and Amboseli National Park, designed for a complete Kenya experience.

  • Timed to maximize chances of witnessing the Great Migration, one of the most breathtaking wildlife events.

  • A perfect mix of wildlife, landscapes, and culture, not just a checklist trip but a real experience.

  • Scenic journeys through the stunning Great Rift Valley, making even travel days memorable.

item.title: The Great Migration Safari: Tanzania at It's Wildest
item.description:
🌟 Why Choose This Tanzania Safari

  • Carefully crafted itinerary covering icons like Serengeti and Ngorongoro Crater, designed for a complete Kenya experience.
  • Timed to maximize chances of witnessing the Great Migration, one of the most breathtaking wildlife events.
  • A perfect mix of wildlife, landscapes, and culture, not just a checklist trip but a real experience.
  • Scenic journeys through the stunning savannah make even travel days memorable.
  • Meaningful interaction with the Maasai community for an authentic cultural connection.
  • Personally selected stays that balance comfort, location, and true safari vibe.
  • Designed keeping real traveler needs in mind, from pacing to photo opportunities.
  • Well-coordinated group feels with well-managed logistics, so you can focus on enjoying every moment.
  • Enjoy close wildlife interactions, including touching a lion, feeding giraffes, zebras, and other animals.

🏆 Cost of The Trip

  1. Double Sharing: USD 2295 ~~ INR 2,09,000# (+GST + Other Charges) per person.
  2. Triple Sharing: USD 2190 ~~ INR 1,99,500# (+GST + Other Charges) per person.
  3. Solo Traveller: USD 2550 ~~ INR 2,32,300# (+GST + Other Charges) per person.

item.title: East Africa Migration Safari: From Maasai Mara to Serengeti National Park
item.description:
🌟 Why Choose This Safari

  • Carefully crafted itinerary covering icons like Maasai Mara, Amboseli National Park, Serengeti, and Ngorongoro Crater, designed for a complete Kenya & Tanzania experience.
  • Timed to maximize chances of witnessing the Great Migration, one of the most breathtaking wildlife events.
  • A perfect mix of wildlife, landscapes, and culture, not just a checklist trip but a real experience.
  • Scenic journeys through the stunning savannah make even travel days memorable.
  • Meaningful interaction with the Maasai community for an authentic cultural connection.
  • Enjoy close wildlife interactions, including touching a lion, feeding giraffes, zebras, and other animals.
  • Personally selected stays that balance comfort, location, and true safari vibe.
  • Designed keeping real traveler needs in mind, from pacing to photo opportunities.
  • Well-coordinated group feels with well-managed logistics, so you can focus on enjoying every moment.

🏆 Cost of The Trip

  1. Double Sharing: USD 4120 ~~ INR 3,75,300# (+GST + Other Charges) per person.
  2. Triple Sharing: USD 4165 ~~ INR 3,79,500# (+GST + Other Charges) per person.
  3. Solo Traveller: USD 4655 ~~ INR 4,24,000# (+GST + Other Charges) per person.

item.title: Antarctic & Arctic Cruise Planning & Facilitation
item.description:
Who This Is For?

  • First-time polar travelers.
  • Solo travelers, couples, or small groups.
  • Wildlife and photography enthusiasts.
  • Travelers who want safe and well-planned polar cruises.
  • People who want honest guidance without confusion.

What do we do as Cruise Facilitators?

Cruises in polar regions involve complex logistics, limited availability, and strict rules. We simplify everything by:

1. Understanding your goals:

  • Travel dates, budget, and interests.
  • Must-see places like South Georgia, the Falklands, Svalbard, Greenland, etc.
  • Wildlife focus, photography, and adventure.

2. Finding the right cruise

  • Best route and ship options.
  • Cabin recommendations.
  • Comparing inclusions, expedition programs, and pricing.

3. Handling the planning

  • Itinerary planning and route options.
  • Flight suggestions and airport transfers.
  • Visa and travel documentation guidance.
  • Pre-departure checklist.

4. Connecting you with the best operators

  • Trusted and verified polar cruise companies.
  • High safety standards.
  • Experienced expedition teams.
  • Responsible tourism practices.

How It Works

  • You share your travel dates, budget, and interests.
  • We shortlist the best cruise options.
  • You choose the cruise that fits your style.
  • You pay the cruise operator directly.
  • We support you until departure.

item.title: Netherlands & Belgium 4 days
item.description:
Our Insights: Tips and lessons from our firsthand experiences—things  we wish we knew before traveling! 

Preparation Tips: Insurance, currency, visa info, SIM cards, and other  essentials to get you ready for the trip. 

Comprehensive 4-Day Itinerary: A tested plan to make the most of  your time exploring Belgium and Amsterdam.

item.title: Paris 4 days itinerary
item.description:
Prep Tips: Everything you need to know before you go—insurance,  currency, visas, SIM cards, and more.

Our Insights: Learn from our firsthand experiences, with tips we wish  we had known!

Detailed 4-Day Plan: Make the most of your time with a day-by-day  itinerary covering all the must-see sights. 

Activity Booking Links: Save time with direct links to book top  attractions.

item.title: Switzerland 7 Day Itinerary
item.description:
Our Insights: Tips and lessons from our firsthand experiences—things  we wish we knew before traveling!  

Preparation Tips: The best time to visit, travel insurance advice,  currency and visa guidance, SIM card options, and how to make the  most of your Swiss Pass.  

Detailed 7-Day Itinerary: A day-by-day plan with alternatives to match  your preferences and pace.  Attraction

Booking Links: Save time with curated links to the places  we loved most.

item.title: Northern Lights Private Tour 2026
item.description:
This 7 nights/8 days guided winter adventure in Finland is crafted for dreamers and lovers of snow covered landscapes.

Enjoy husky safaris, glass igloos and magical Northern Lights.

day

Day 1: Arrival in Helsinki
Day 2: Lapland Tour
Day 3: Northern Lights Safari

accommodation

Glass Igloo Resort
Arctic TreeHouse Hotel

inclusion

Airport transfer
Daily breakfast
Snowmobile safari

fees

Flights not included
Personal expenses

item.title: Our Story
item.description:
story: title: “Our Story”

paragraphs: - “We are Mahulima and Kaustuv, the faces behind Passport Stories. We create travel content to inspire you and make planning your next adventure easier.” - “Over the years, we’ve explored the globe and collected memories from every corner.”

images: - “/images/story1.jpg” - “/images/story2.jpg”

item.title: Ready To Go Products
item.description: All our digital products are available for instant download.

item.title: Tanzania Safari Group Tour
item.description: This is a guided group safari covering Tanzania’s top wildlife parks with experienced local guides.

item.title: Traveling from 10 to 15 Days
item.description: What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package:  A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).  Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.  A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.  Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.  Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and more memorable.

item.title: Traveling upto 10 Days
item.description:
What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package

  • A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).
  • Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.
  • A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.
  • Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.
  • Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and more memorable

item.title: Traveling upto 6 Days
item.description:
What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package:

  • A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).
  • Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.
  • A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.
  • Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.
  • Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and morememorable.
